papers_mined.title: Cohesion-Tension Theory (LibreTexts)
papers_mined.note: Continuous unbroken water column from leaf to root; hydrogen-bond cohesion + adhesion to xylem walls; negative pressure transmitted via cohesion.

papers_mined.title: Cohesion-tension theory in trees and lianas (PMC)
papers_mined.note: Dixon-Joly 1894; cohesion-tension water transport upward; ~100m+ vertical lift via combined cohesion + transpiration pull.

papers_mined.title: Xylem water transport in plants
papers_mined.note: Surface tension + hydrogen bonds maintain water column under tension.

papers_mined.title: Surface tension role in xylem (Tree Physiology)
papers_mined.note: Cavitation risk; small perforations prevent gas bubble propagation across tracheids.
